properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS RAW to Synapse database
Data Transformation used to update PROJECT  and perform other ETL activities

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Project as string,
		System as string,
		{System Description} as string,
		{Sub System} as string,
		{Sub System Description} as string,
		{Tag Number} as string,
		{Tag Description} as string,
		{Tag Type} as string,
		{Punch Item} as string,
		Description as string,
		Discipline as string,
		{Discipline Desc.} as string,
		Category as string,
		{Raised By} as string,
		{Raised Date} as string,
		{Action By} as string,
		Notes as string,
		Status as string,
		{Cleared By} as string,
		{Cleared Date} as string,
		{Verified By} as string,
		{Verified Date} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true) ~> srcPunchItemRAWLatest
srcPunchItemRAWLatest derive(Project = iif(length(Project)>5,concat('99',Project),Project)) ~> DataTransformation
DataTransformation sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		Project,
		System,
		System_Description = {System Description},
		Sub_System = {Sub System},
		Sub_System_Description = {Sub System Description},
		Tag_Number = {Tag Number},
		Tag_Description = {Tag Description},
		Tag_Type = {Tag Type},
		Punch_Item = {Punch Item},
		Punch_Item_Description = Description,
		Discipline,
		Discipline_Desc = {Discipline Desc.},
		Category,
		Raised_By = {Raised By},
		Raised_Date = {Raised Date},
		Action_By = {Action By},
		Notes,
		Status,
		Cleared_By = {Cleared By},
		Cleared_Date = {Cleared Date},
		Verified_By = {Verified By},
		Verified_Date = {Verified Date}
	)) ~> snkPunchItemRptSynapse
